Notice Of Motion And Motion For To Vacating Rtao [Dated August 31, 2023] And Vacate Of Rtao Nunc Pro Tunc And Replace With October 16, 2023 With The Identical Attachment Filings And Pursuant To C.C.P. Section 484.090(D)
Off Calendar Oct-05-2023 Off Calendar

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Aug-31-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
David Cook, Esq. 415-989-4730 for Plaintiff.
Court reporter: Jamie Onuki, CSR #13904, 714-390-5641, jamieonuki@gmail.com, Reported.
No other Appearance.

Hearing is held. Mr. Cook apprises the Court what happens after the Court signs an order. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF TRIMARK, ERF, INC. APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER.

Application is granted. Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Reported. (302/JMQ)
